scenarios.title: LLM Fine-Tuning, Training, and Serving Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Transformers model usage, local generation, fine-tuning, serving CLIs, PEFT adapters, LlamaFactory/Axolotl/ms-swift training, vLLM/SGLang/LMDeploy serving, BentoML model services, and LLM deployment.
scenarios.role: Use bitsandbytes for k-bit PyTorch quantization, Hugging Face quantized model loading, 8-bit and paged optimizers, direct quantized layers/functions, and backend installation diagnostics.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `bitsandbytes` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: installation diagnostics, optimizers training, quantized modules functions, and transformers integrations.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `bitsandbytes` when the request names `bitsandbytes`, centers on k-bit PyTorch quantization, Hugging Face quantized model loading, 8-bit and paged optimizers, direct quantized layers/functions, and backend installation diagnostics, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in llm finetuning training serving workflows. Then route to installation diagnostics, optimizers training, quantized modules functions, or transformers integrations when those focused workflows match.
